text:
On Mon, Jan 01, 2001 at 02:52:15AM +0200, Roman Shterenzon wrote:
> You're right, but, take a look at pkg-install - it's sendmail specific.
> I think that I better run it with PRE-CONFIGURE - ask which MTA to use,
> create Makefile.inc and then proceed.

No.  Use my suggestion.  It is more modular.

wca
